title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 534.130 - Failure of defendant to appear
text:
534.130.  Failure of defendant to appear. — If the defendant, being duly summoned, does not appear at the time appointed for hearing the complaint, the judge shall proceed with the hearing of the cause.
(RSMo 1939 § 2841, A.L. 1945 p. 1089, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2455; 1919 § 3003; 1909 § 7665 
Effective 1-02-79
